_credit.license: PixelLab Terms of Service — output may be used commercially in user projects. May NOT be used to train models.
_credit.prompt: a single green slime jelly blob, IMPORTANT: this is NOT an animal, NOT a creature, NOT a cat, NOT a lizard, NOT a frog, NO body parts at all. The character is JUST a single round green gelatinous jelly droplet shape sitting on the ground, like a perfectly smooth dome of green pudding or jello. It has ONLY two tiny black dot eyes floating on the front of the green jelly. NO legs, NO feet, NO arms, NO ears, NO tail, NO mouth, NO head, NO neck. The entire silhouette is a single curved blob shape with rounded base and softly pointed top, like a Dragon Quest slime or chemistry beaker droplet. Single black outline, simple flat green colors, 3-color palette, minimalist 16-bit RPG NPC sprite

_notes.paletteScheme: Quantised to PetPalettes index 3 (Fresh Green). Slots: 1=outline 2=primary 3=secondary 4=highlight 5=accent 6=pattern. Swap the palette block at render time to recolour.
_notes.mirrored: All frames mirrored horizontally during import (East-facing baseline; PixelLab west.png faces left).
_notes.groundOffsetsY: Per-stage feet-row index from the top of the 48-row canvas — used by PetStage to bottom-anchor sprites so all displayScales sit on the ground line correctly.
